## Maintenance Task

**Repo(s):** 
**Task type:** Health check / Dependency update / Security fix / Archival review / Release prep / Other

### Description

_What needs to be done and why._

### Checklist

- [ ] Repo inventory checked (`repos/repo-inventory.md`)
- [ ] Relevant template used (`templates/`)
- [ ] Changes logged in `repos/maintenance-log.md`

### Scope

- [ ] Single repo
- [ ] Multiple repos (list below)
- [ ] Cross-ecosystem

### Dependencies

_Any blocking tasks or prerequisites:_

### Definition of Done

- [ ] Task complete
- [ ] `maintenance-log.md` updated
- [ ] `repo-inventory.md` updated (if status changed)
- [ ] PR merged (if code changes were needed)

---

**For more detail, see:** `repos/repo-health-checks.md` and `repos/maintenance-log.md` in the Builder Journal.
